mapper.sql: select br.id, br.area_name from building_area br inner join building_info bi on (br.building_id = bi.id) inner join sys_dept d on (bi.dept_id = d.dept_id)
mapper.select: select bpi.building_id, bpi.id as point_id, bpi.block, bpi.zone, bpi.zone_sub, bpi.point_name, ba.id as area_id, ba.area_name, ba.area_type, bi.name as building_name, bfi.floor_name, tbpi.ter_sn, ti.gateway from building_point_info bpi left join building_floor_info bfi on (bpi.floor_id = bfi.id) left join building_area_point bap on (bpi.id = bap.point_id and bap.area_id = #{areaId}) left join building_area ba on (bap.area_id = ba.id) left join building_info bi on (bpi.building_id = bi.id) left join ter_building_point_info tbpi on (tbpi.point_id = bpi.id) inner join ter_info ti on (tbpi.ter_sn = ti.sn) inner join ter_sensor_status tss on (tbpi.ter_sn = tss.ter_sn and tss.sensor_type = 'post') inner join sys_dept d on (bi.dept_id = d.dept_id) where bpi.building_id = #{buildingId}
mapper.insert:
insert into building_area
id, area_name, building_id,
#{id}, #{areaName}, #{buildingId},

insert into building_area_staff(id, area_id, user_id, time_config) values
(#{item.id},#{item.areaId},#{item.userId},#{item.timeConfig})
